song_name: Brandy - I Wanna Be Down - Mariah Carey - Dreamlover - Fantasy
version_description: Simple 2 chord progression with three 90's RnB classics.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Transpose or use capo to suit vocal range. If you have a second singer add in the Dreamlover or Fantasy intros
as a filler wherever feels right
